action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline mae_60min=6.5848 (mae_avg=6.1163) with simple 3-layer GCN (hidden=64), 5 epochs; train loss decreased steadily to 0.4566, val MAE to 5.487. Analysis: Model has limited capacity for spatiotemporal patterns (no explicit temporal conv, small hidden dim); still improving so scaling hidden dim, adding layer+dropout for regularization, more epochs + LR scheduler will reduce error especially on longer horizons like 60min without overfitting (N=207 keeps it efficient). Decision: Update model to hidden=256 w/ dropout=0.1 and extra GCN layer, revise train.py for 20 epochs, ReduceLROnPlateau, explicit model args; keep predict.py; run training then submit_eval for improved score and time measurement.
